text:
What wonderful news! Becoming a parent is truly one of life's greatest adventures, and I'm thrilled for your friend. This is such a special milestone, marking the beginning of an incredible journey filled with love, growth, and countless precious moments.

Parenthood will bring so much joy and meaning to their life. The sleepless nights, the worry, the endless questions—all of it will be more than worth it when they see their child's smile or experience those quiet moments of connection. Their world has just expanded in the most beautiful way possible.

I'm sure they're going to be a wonderful parent. Please tell them how happy you are for them and that you're here to support them in this exciting new chapter. Whether they need advice, a listening ear, or just someone to celebrate the milestones with, they're lucky to have a friend like you in their corner. Congratulations to the new parents!
